subcodes.title: Words spoken at 1815 California Street in San Francisco, 1912-10-07
subcodes.first_line: I have been walking in the garden. There are many parks and gardens here…. When I was in the barracks of Acca, than which there is no worse place
subcodes.subjects: @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @happiness; joyfulness; joy and sorrow, @stories; anecdotes, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @suffering and imprisonment, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
